RULING - ARGUED. Hearing is held. The Court announces everything seems to be in order re: disbursement of settlement funds and no one has expressed an opinion to the contrary. Mr. Feghali informs the Court this is the final hearing on the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING (CASE REVIEW) RE: DISTRIBUTION.

The Court approves the distribution. No further hearing required.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement is filed.

The Court instructs plaintiff to submit a proposed order as to the motion and a separate proposed judgment. As to the parties' request to set a compliance hearing date, the parties may state an agreed-upon non-Friday date in their proposed order.
